description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black and metallic gray finish, accented by blue highlights along the barrel and stock. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a smooth, unvented top and a short muzzle at the front. The receiver is compact and angular, with visible mechanical details and a mounted sight or accessory on top. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a pistol-style handle, while the stock is minimalistic and integrated into the rear of the receiver. There are several colored buttons or switches near the trigger area, suggesting electronic or tactical enhancements. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern, black and metallic gray shotgun with blue accents, a long barrel, and a compact, tactical design. Features an ergonomic grip, minimal stock, and visible electronic or tactical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the long barrel, compact receiver, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the twin-barrel alignment, sighting system, and the symmetry of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same structural features as view 0, with additional visibility of the mounted accessory and trigger area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the alignment of the barrels, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and rear sight.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, smooth, unvented top and no visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced lower edge and integrated finger groove
